scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --ignore src/generated --watch ../packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma --ext js,prisma --exec 'npx prisma generate --schema=../packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && node --experimental-transform-types src/index.js'
scripts.start: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=../packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && node --experimental-transform-types src/index.js
